Class MaskedArgumentAspect

java.lang.Object
io.signoz.springboot.masking.MaskedArgumentAspect
@Component @Order(1) public class MaskedArgumentAspect extends Object
AOP aspect that intercepts bean method calls and replaces @Masked-annotated arguments with their masked representation before the method executes.

This ensures that even if the called method logs its arguments internally, the sensitive values are never exposed.

Only applies to Spring-managed beans (AOP proxy scope). For non-managed objects, apply masking explicitly using MaskingRegistry.

This aspect runs at high priority (@Order(1)) so masking happens before any other advice (e.g. tracing, auditing) that might log arguments.

    maskArguments(org.aspectj.lang.ProceedingJoinPoint joinPoint)
    Intercept all public methods on Spring beans where at least one parameter has the @Masked annotation.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait
